methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Growth → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.2x) to $100M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Climate & Energy (found 1 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Climate & Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

private.name: Ascend Elements
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Growth), post-money $3B+

data.narrative:
MineSense Technologies is a Growth-stage frontier-tech company in Climate & Energy that has raised over $100M to date. The comparable universe includes one public peer (LNZA) and eight private companies operating in the same sector, though a sufficiently tight cohort of same-stage peers was unavailable for robust median benchmarking.

The analysis applies stage-progression methodology, using the $100M total raised as a valuation proxy and applying a 1.2x step-up multiplier typical for Growth-stage advancement. This yields an implied valuation of $120M. Peer-median analysis was not applicable; while 21 same-sector peers exist, the narrow filters (same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-valuation-tier) did not produce three or more datapoints necessary for reliable median estimation. Expanding to all-sector peers would risk introducing significant noise given sector heterogeneity.

The triangulation supports a valuation range of $102M to $138M, with a median estimate of $120M. Key uncertainties include the quality of the $100M raised proxy in reflecting current market conditions and the absence of direct peer comparables at identical stage and valuation tier. Any forward valuation should be conditioned on revenue trajectory, capital efficiency metrics, and shifts in the Climate & Energy funding environment.
